lines.text: Polar Patios at Blizzard Beach Water Park | Walt Disney World Resort
Unwind on your own private, shaded deck with convenient amenities at Disney’s Blizzard Beach water park.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Renting a Polar Patio is a great way for your group to relax together during your day of way-cool fun at Disney’s Blizzard Beach water park.
Each Standard Polar Patio can accommodate a maximum of 10 Guests and includes the following amenities:
Attendants are on hand to help you get the most out of the water park. And when you’re craving a meal or snack, they can take your order for food and beverages (separate dining charges apply).
Looking for additional amenities, like a mini fridge and fan? Consider booking a Premium Polar Patio.
Advance reservations are highly recommended as Polar Patios book quickly—and are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
To inquire about same-day availability, please visit Beach Haus upon arrival at the park.
Prices for Standard Polar Patios vary based on date—and range from $225 to $425 per day, plus tax.
Valid water park admission is required.
One Guest in the party must be at least 18 years old.
Guests who need to cancel Polar Patio reservations must provide 24-hour advance notice. The full price of your reservation will be charged in the event of no-shows or same-day cancellations.
Rentals may be cancelled by the water park due to inclement weather. If this occurs, Guests will not be charged.
Availability of amenities may change without notice. Please check at the time of booking to confirm what will be provided.
Enjoy all the amenities of the Standard Polar Patio—as well as a mini fridge, fan and more.
Enjoy a mini oasis for up to 4 Guests—with an umbrella, chairs and towels.
